text.title: WCAG 2.2 Compliance Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is there an existing WCAG 2.1 AA audit baseline?

branch.question: Does every auth flow provide a no-cog alternate?

text.example: Concrete walk: Faion Web has 2.1 AA baseline; auth provides passkey + email-link; carousel buttons resized to 28×28; sticky header sets scroll-margin-top → publish-delta.
